title: Supply Chain Manager - Shiprocket - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Shiprocket - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
